test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToGetAdminUserInformation
test-method.description: This test case verifies that a valid user is able to log in to the application and successfully add a new admin user by providing the required details. It ensures that the system displays a confirmation alert after saving the admin user information.

exception.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[@class='alert alert-success alert-dismissible']"} (Session info: chrome=146.0.7680.155) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#nosuchelementexception Build info: version: '4.38.0', revision: '6b412e825c*' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [bed3929db749dae99260dab040aace07, findElement {value=//div[@class='alert alert-success alert-dismissible'], using=xpath}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.155, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\LENOVO\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:52053}, goog:processID: 21832, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:52053/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.155, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: bed3929db749dae99260dab040aace07

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToGetAdminUserInformation
test-method.description: This test case verifies that a valid user is able to log in to the application and successfully add a new admin user by providing the required details. It ensures that the system displays a confirmation alert after saving the admin user information.

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToGetAdminUserInformation
test-method.description: This test case verifies that a valid user is able to log in to the application and successfully add a new admin user by providing the required details. It ensures that the system displays a confirmation alert after saving the admin user information.
